college_info.college_name: Malabar Medical College Hospital and Research Centre: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Malabar Medical College Hospital and Research Centre:

faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

faqs.question: What is the fee range for the courses offered at Malabar Medical College Hospital and Research Centre?
faqs.answer: The fee bracket for programs offerred by the Malabar Medical College Hospital and Research Centre is approximately INR 2868750 - INR 4725000.

faqs.question: Is Malabar Medical College Hospital and Research Centre a known college/Institute?
faqs.answer: Malabar Medical College Hospital and Research Centre is a renowned institution offering MD, MS, B.Sc, MBBS. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Medicine & Health Sciences, Nursing. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. Malabar Medical College Hospital and Research Centre boasts an impressive review rating of 3.58 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 3.56 for Campus Life, 3.33 for Placements, 3.89 for Faculty, and 3.56 for Infrastructure.

faqs.question: Which courses does Malabar Medical College Hospital and Research Centre offer?
faqs.answer: Malabar Medical College Hospital and Research Centre provides programmes including MD, MS, B.Sc, MBBS in streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences, Nursing, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Dermatology, ENT, Pediatrics, General Medicine, Orthopaedics, Psychiatry, General Surgery, Ophthalmology, Community Medicine, Anesthesiology, Obstetrics & Gynecology, Microbiology, Anatomy.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Malabar Medical College Hospital and Research Centre offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences and Nursing. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.Sc. and MBBS. Whereas, at PG level, Malabar Medical College Hospital and Research Centre offers courses such as MD and MS. Malabar Medical College Hospital and Research Centre fee structure for all the courses is around INR 33,69,186 to 55,49,244.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: College review for Mmc(mbbs)

review_content.Placements: 150 students from my batch, but seats have increased to 200 from 2022 batch onwards. Majority are girls. Reservation are there for various categories and different scholarships are also available. Internship is done here itself after course for 1year.
review_content.Infrastructure: Air conditioned lecture halls, library with many seatings and opened till 9.30pm (11pm during exams ). Mess and canteen both are available. Mess is in hostel while canteen is near hospital. Academic block has a cafeteria downstairs. Mess is open till 9.30pm.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: This is an excellent college for education.

review_content.Infrastructure: Hostels provide top-notch security and at the same time, the right amount of freedom for students. The food is good. We have good room service and medical facilities 24x7. A well-functioning restroom and great halls are available on campus.
review_content.Faculty: Our college offers a wide variety of courses in the medical field such as MBBS, BDS, and four different courses under paramedical. Due to the excellence of our teaching faculty, about 80-90% of students pass out each year. Teachers have top-notch educational skills and are well-qualified for their posts. They are highly knowledgeable and easy to approach. Their skills make us ready to face the challenges of the profession. Semester exams are easy to hard.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Excellent faculty, good classes and infrastructure facilities, with better placement.

review_content.Placements: Most of the government and private hospitals recruit us for work usually. Around 90 percentage of the students complete their internship within the same college. The course offers many possibilities in and outside the country in medical field.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure facilities. There are two blocks within the campus - one hospital block where patients are treated and postings are held and another academic block where lecture classes are taken. There are three classrooms on the academic floor for each batch. Lab facilities are available for all the subjects of all batches. Wi-Fi facility is available in the digital library. A library facility with two hundred seats are also available. Hostels also have a well-maintained structure. Food in the mess is of enough quality. Canteen is well maintained. There is badminton court, football ground, cricket pitch, volleyball court, etc. Free medical facilities are available for students.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: It is a college with very good facilities and high-standard lecture halls.

review_content.Placements: A total of 150 students are been admitted each year to our college. Soon it is going to be raised to 200 seats. MBBS is a professional course and completing the course will lead us to a noble profession, I don't think it would be that hard to get a placement. We could either work in our medical college hospital or could get placed in some other hospitals of our interest.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has recently built a new academic block with great infrastructure, high-quality air-conditioned lecture halls, and a peaceful surrounding. The labs are well equipped with all the necessary amenities, an MBBS student could ask for. Our hostel is within 100 meters of our college and it is good enough for a normal student. The food available in our mess is okay with the usual ups and downs. They also provide us with a canteen, appropriate medical facilities, playground, badminton court, gym, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatisfied with the infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: The college is very good. It is doing a good job to make good doctors. A total of 150 students are there in our college. A good percentage of students are passing year by year with great experience in our hospital postings. The fee charged is Rs. 6,55,000.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is good, but it is still in a developing state. The infrastructure is not soo good, but in a time of 2 years, this college will become the best college in Kerala. It is planning to make the students number to 200 so that more students can study here.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: It is a moderately good medical college

review_content.Placements: Since it is a mbbs course,almost 100% students get placed,some go for higher education action or psc. Some can enter as junior resident in the college itself after graduation. You can try higher education via plab,usmle, neet pg etc.. or go for private or government practice.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is not bad,centralised ac classes,labs for each department, and a library with almost all medical books you might need to refer. The food in the mess is average,l won't say tasty but it is not that bad compared to other mess foods,sometimes it is very tasty.

admission_process.title: Malabar Medical College Hospital and Research Centre Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Malabar Medical College Hospital and Research Centre admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Malabar Medical College Hospital and Research Centreoffers courses at UG and PG levels. Some of the courses include MBBS, B.Sc., MD and MS. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 36,72,171. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 66 months - 4 years. PG courses are offered for 3 years.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculties, infra, placements and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college has better infrastructure and facilities among private medical colleges in South India and is developing with 200 students per batch. We have separate libraries, reading rooms in the hostel and college, a gym at hostels, and a mess facility within the compound. The mess food is not very satisfying and is not up to standard. There is also a canteen in the compound and two cafeterias. We have a large ground, and tennis, badminton, volleyball, and basketball courts at the hilltop. Cultu...

reviews.review_heading: Well impressed by the college.
reviews.review_text: The college's facilities include a library, music room, study hall, badminton court, football court, garden, etc. The college also encourages arts activities for intermedicos and zonal competitions in arts as well as sports. The hostel has a gym and a study hall.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good when compared to other private medical colleges.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available right now. The classrooms are superb, and a library is available. A mess is available nearby. Separate mess facilities are available for boys and girls. There is a good badminton court near the mess. Football, basketball and volleyball courts are available.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty here.
reviews.review_text: The quality of the food is good. We have badminton, volleyball, basketball, cricket, and football grounds. As it is a medical college, we get free OP consultations and various discounts. We have a coach to supervise our sports activities. We can renew the mess menu if we are dissatisfied.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good infrastructure and it provides good facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good. The lecture hall is very good, with centralised air-conditioning, an inverter, a smart board, etc. The college has an elevator facility. The hostel is good, with an attached bathroom, an elevator, a personal shelf, etc. Food is very good and tasty almost all the time. Our college has a great infrastructure.

individual_reviews.title: The Review of SMBT Ayurved College and Hospital.

content.Placements: This is a medical college; that's why there are no placements that take place in our college. The students should build their own empire or job. The college provides well-knowledge students to the market. They provide us with a good type of knowledge. That's why students have good knowledge. Students secure positions based on their knowledge at any hospital, or they can open their own clinics in the market. They experience a lot of things during their practice time.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good, and well-developed systems are used in the college premises. The infrastructure is advanced. The infrastructure is attractive and systematic. The college has a well-developed campus and building. The infrastructure of the college makes it very attractive, and everyone is drawn towards the college.

individual_reviews.course: Ayurvedacharya in Medical Science - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Great infrastructure and good environment for studying.

content.Placements: This college doesn't offer placement like an engineering college. You have to work in the ayurvedic hospital of this college to complete your internship. The internship period is 1 year. As it is a private institute, a stipend is not provided or is really low. Patient flow is enough for studying.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is the best among all B.A.M.S. colleges in Maharashtra. The campus is also well maintained. The college has its own central library, which really provides a great environment for studying. The hostel is also good. Mess food is average. Overall, it is a good college.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with everything .
reviews.review_text: The facilities are very good there is no convenience. The infrastructure of labs and classroom is also very comfortable. Also there are many books in library to read and also Wi-Fi services everywhere. The hostel facilities are excellent also food of canteen and mess is very hygienic and good taste. Also there are many opportunities for student's pursuing ani game or sports.

reviews.review_heading: Smbt ayurved college is best college.
reviews.review_text: My college infrastructure is very good and absolutely amazing. This is four floor building there has free Wi-Fi network available for each students. Classroom also has the best room I ever seen. In college library nearly 2000 different type of books available for students. Hostel is also good all facilities available there as home.

reviews.review_heading: Looking for B.A.M.S. then choose Smbt.
reviews.review_text: This college has the huge infrastructure once you get into to college through GATE you'll get to SEE many huge buildings and hospital everywhere. The classrooms are clean and advanced and the labs have every equipment required for students. They have every advanced and top quality facilities there. Hostel are nice and you have own B.A.M.S. mess which food quality is good. College have it's humongous ground in which all types of sports are played.

reviews.review_heading: The review of smbt ayurved college.
reviews.review_text: Our course has separate practical lab for required subject such as anatomy and physiology. Hostel room are very clean and properly setup. Quality of food is very good. Our campus is healthy and envolve in most of sport activities such as cricket? Canteen staff maintaining the cleanliness in canteen .

reviews.review_heading: Our college have absolutely good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college provide well facilities to their students but they don't provide us wi-fi, classrooms are well. We don't have any hostel in our campus for our course we live in pharmacy hostel they don't provide special hostel for our students, canteen facilities are better than other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: The only one thing that is best in the college is the college fest, events, and surrounding campus.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is not the best, but we can say it is better. The hostel infrastructure is too bad; no Wi-Fi is available, there is a water problem, and there are cleaning problems. It’s not a place where students can live, but students have no option. Don’t talk about the fee; fees are more than we can imagine according to the infrastructure. There are too many restrictions in the hostel, and the hostel staff behaves like students are criminals.

reviews.review_heading: This college is only a show-off, faculty is worst, very childish faculty. No cooperative environment
reviews.review_text: Look, the hostel facilities were good, not bad type. But our college mess food is literally bad, and the worst thing that happened here is that food mess is compulsory here. And my college is literally in the jungle, meaning 34 km far from Nashik, so it's very outside the city. Your main problem in college is food.

reviews.review_heading: Review of smbt ayurved college.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure of college and hostel is well-equipped with all basic needs and well infrastructure the college infrastructure includes the playground, auditorium, amphitheatre and also well-equipped classroom and practical labs
Talking about hostel the rooms are spacious and provides all basic facilities in room and assure 24/7 electricity and water supply.

review_content.Placements: As it is a doctorate, you will get a job in a hospital according to your talent and skills. The management or placement cell is not involved in providing us with jobs. The minimum salary one can get is Rs 25,000 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: Being an old building, the infrastructure of our college is good enough. Classrooms and hostel are worth it. Good education is provided on our campus. Other facilities like Wi-Fi, library, sports, and games besides medical facilities are satisfactory.
review_content.Faculty: Our faculty members are highly qualified and helpful. The course curriculum is relevant and helps us build a good future. Semester exams are tough. Good preparation is required to pass the exams.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Our campus is good, and faculty members are excellent.

review_content.Placements: I am a student of Gaur Brahman Ayurvedic College, Barhmanwas, Rohtak. There are a total of 100 students in my batch. 65% of placements are provided by our college. The highest package offered is 70,000 per month. Companies come to our college, but our college is in a village. Students have to work hard for good placements. Practical knowledge is not provided, which is a great disadvantage here.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities are not much good. Wi-Fi is good. The building is in poor condition. There are no air-conditioners in classrooms but only in offices. Water facilities are very low. The electricity supply is very good. Solar panels and generators are also present.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: I am not satisfied with its infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Placements were good in this college. The lowest salary package offered was 2.5 LPA, and the highest salary package depends on students' knowledge. Around 30% of students got internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides low-quality Wi-Fi. Laboratories were old, and there was no proper functioning equipment. Classrooms were not good, and there was no security. The canteen was not good. Students were also not allowed to enter the hostel to drink water.
review_content.Faculty: Some teachers were good, and some were not good. Question papers were difficult, and the maximum number of students failed. They were qualified but not knowledgeable. They do not know how to teach students.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of The West Bengal University of Health Sciences.

review_content.Placements: After 4.5 years of MBBS course, one can directly get entry into the internship, which is paid. The total tenure of the internship is 1 year. One can get near about 30k/month for 1 year in the internship. There are a lot of opportunities, mainly learning opportunities.
review_content.Infrastructure: Faculty members are well qualified. There's a lot of scope to learn. Clinical subjects are taught very well in the hospital. Besides, one can get a free medical check-up being their student. So it is considered an easy-to-commute college as it is situated on the outskirts of Kolkata. Our hostel facilities are the best among all the old colleges of our state. Two students share a single room. The rooms are also very well-lit. Each has one window. When we were allotted the hostels, we got one almirah, one study table and chair, one mattress, and one bed.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: The college where dreams come true.

review_content.Placements: Placements as such do not happen in our course. After completion of our internship in our college, we can practice as MBBS graduates (45k per month or more based on government or private firm) or do postgraduate after giving NEET PG or Next 60k per month depending upon the branch and year. Almost all the students get jobs just after getting MBBS degree.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have huge classroom and large laboratories equipped with the latest instruments, specimens, chemicals, machineries, etc. The library is divided in two floors, one on the first floor and the other on the ground floor. The classrooms and the library is fully air-conditioned with Wi-Fi facility. Hostel facilities are good, like water filter and cooler present on every floor, water supply 24*7, electricity 24*7, big playground, comfortable rooms with furniture, etc. Food in canteen is not great but good. Football, cricket, badminton, etc. Tournaments are held often. Medical facilities are always present.

review_summary.college_name: College of Medicine and JNM Hospital, Nadia - The West Bengal University of Health Sciences Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: COMJNMH Where Dreams Come True

content.Placements: The internship must be done at the college where the course is completed. The stipend ranges from 28k-32k or more, but one has to work day and night to earn that, sometimes up to 24 hours or more at a stretch. However, this is a great way to learn practically and helps in cracking difficult PG entrance exams.
content.Infrastructure: College life is full of fun activities, and you will never get bored; something or the other keeps happening. We have an annual fest called KAIZMA held in September, which is 5-6 days of enjoyment and much more. The college has a huge library divided into two sections: one on the ground floor (open 24/7) and the other on the first floor. Almost all kinds of books are available. Our classrooms are well-equipped with large projectors, whiteboards, ACs, etc. We also have football and cricket tournaments and many extracurricular activities occurring frequently on the campus grounds. Many clubs are available, such as dance, music, cultural magazines, drama, photography, painting, etc. The hostel provides a single almirah and a bed sufficient for one person. Mess food is quite okay but may not have a large menu. The registration process is simple—just fill out the forms and verify them with identification documents. The cost is only Rs. 100 per month, which is affordable. If anyone wants to rent a room or PG, it's easily available in the area around our college, such as in A1 block, A2 block, B block, etc. Hostel Fee: INR 1200 per year.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: If one wants to pursue MBBS from a good college outside Kolkata, this is a good choice.

content.Placements: After pursuing MBBS degree from here, you can start your career as an intern doctor and within that one year of internship you will gain excellent experience in medicine, surgery etc. After completing internship, you will be appointed as a house staff for one year. Salary of interns and house staff are 28k and 45k respectively.
content.Infrastructure: The college has excellent hostel facilities. There are single and double sharing rooms available. There are wardens for both boys and girls hostels and they are very watchful people. In case someone faces any problem, they can directly inform MS sir. The seniors are very caring.

reviews.review_heading: COMJNMH Where Dreams Come True
reviews.review_text: College life is full of fun activities, and you will never get bored; something or the other keeps happening. We have an annual fest called KAIZMA held in September, which is 5-6 days of enjoyment and much more. The college has a huge library divided into two sections: one on the ground floor (open 24/7) and the other on the first floor. Almost all kinds of books are available. Our classrooms are well-equipped with large projectors, whiteboards, ACs, etc. We also have football and cricket tourna...

reviews.review_heading: If one wants to pursue MBBS from a good college outside Kolkata, this is a good choice.
reviews.review_text: The college has excellent hostel facilities. There are single and double sharing rooms available. There are wardens for both boys and girls hostels and they are very watchful people. In case someone faces any problem, they can directly inform MS sir. The seniors are very caring.

reviews.review_heading: Review of The West Bengal University of Health Sciences.
reviews.review_text: Faculty members are well qualified. There's a lot of scope to learn. Clinical subjects are taught very well in the hospital. Besides, one can get a free medical check-up being their student. So it is considered an easy-to-commute college as it is situated on the outskirts of Kolkata. Our hostel facilities are the best among all the old colleges of our state. Two students share a single room. The rooms are also very well-lit. Each has one window. When we were allotted the hostels, we got one almi...

reviews.review_heading: The college where dreams come true.
reviews.review_text: We have huge classroom and large laboratories equipped with the latest instruments, specimens, chemicals, machineries, etc. The library is divided in two floors, one on the first floor and the other on the ground floor. The classrooms and the library is fully air-conditioned with Wi-Fi facility. Hostel facilities are good, like water filter and cooler present on every floor, water supply 24*7, electricity 24*7, big playground, comfortable rooms with furniture, etc. Food in canteen is not great b...

reviews.review_heading: Our college is a professional college, so there is no dissatisfaction. It has a good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: In our college, there are air-conditioned lecture rooms. There is Wi-Fi in every department. There is a central library where students can study without any disturbances. There is a huge auditorium where you can organise festivals, cultural programs, etc. There is a college canteen where you can get vegetarian and non-vegetarian items as well as fast food items.

reviews.review_heading: Rapidly progressive growth since establishment with maintaining good facility and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Good facility quality and experienced staff with a lot of experience in their field. The course is MBBS (Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of surgery). Wi-Fi facility is not available. The hostel is good with delicious food in the canteen. Four canteens are present and have daily Manu changes.

reviews.review_heading: This college has the best infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The classes, lecture theatres, and labs are modern and well-equipped with all the needed gadgets and instruments, and they are ventilated with an air-conditioner. Hostels are good and clean with a secure compound and guards. Rooms are mostly 2-seaters.

reviews.review_heading: Review of COMJNMH, Kalyani, West Bengal.
reviews.review_text: Facilities include lecture halls, laboratory facilities, library (sadly no Wi-Fi). Second year onwards one can get single room, but first year students get rooms with accommodation for two. There are intern, senior boys, junior boys and combined girls hostels. Canteens in senior and junior boys hostel. There are two grounds in present. Area wise it? S the second the largest among all state colleges. We also boast the largest auditorium among all government medical colleges. Food is cheap, tasty ...

college_info.college_name: Vishnu Dental College Andhra pradesh

highlights.summary:
The NEET MDS 2026 application process has commenced for Vishnu Dental College Andhra pradesh admission to the MDS course, with Mar 30, 2026, being the last date to register. Also, the NEET MDS exam 2026 is going to be held on May 2, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

placements.overview:
Vishnu Dental College Andhra pradesh is a private institute, established in 2002 in Bhimavaram, Andhra Pradesh. Vishnu Dental College Andhra pradesh is approved by DCI and offers a total of 9 courses at UG and PG levels in 7 specialisations such as Endodontics, Oral and Maxillofacial Surgery, Oral Medicine & Radiology, Oral Pathology and Orthodontics . Furthermore, it offer courses such as BDS and MDS in Full Time mode. Vishnu Dental College Andhra pradesh fee structure includes a total tuition fee ranging from INR 71,500 to 10,24,650. Vishnu Dental College Andhra pradesh has an annual seat intake of 141 for all the programmes. It offers courses, in stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. As per the recent Vishnu Dental College Andhra pradesh placement records, the average median salary at the Institute is around INR 5,66,667. The institute has a safe and well-equipped campus with all the advanced facilities.

Q. What courses does Vishnu Dental College offer?

A. Vishnu Dental College offers nine courses in the field of Dental Science at UG and PG level. The courses are BDS, MDS and Diploma in Dental Mechanics.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2030
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied till now, and what wait, let’s see in future studies. Thank you.

review_content.Placements: 100 students are placed in my course. The highest package is approximately 40,000, the lowest 15,000, and the average about 25,000 to 30,000 per month. This is after completion of BDS undergraduation. There are no recruiting companies because the course deals with people and their moral health care. The under graduation is 5 years with an internship. In our campus, we have special satellite clinics all over major cities, and we get 100% internship from my course. The role is house surgeon in college.
review_content.Infrastructure: They provide college Wi-Fi throughout the campus, classrooms, and labs. We have digital study on our campus as we use smart learning with Apple iPads and digital classes. Our campus is one of the Apple Distinguished Colleges. We are provided with good liberty, and all the quality of facilities are up to our best standards. They have PhDs in their fields of departments. We have quality food in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities are provided as we have our own Vishnu Dental Hospital nearby. We have sports events every year and daily games.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: BDS at VDC is worth the fees.

review_content.Placements: A total of 100 seats are available for this course. It is based on NEET rank, and we need to apply it in counseling. There will be a mandatory internship for one year, and you will get opportunities to work in the satellite clinics of VDC, which will make you well trained for real clinics.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is one of the best thing you can get exposed to different new systems and current trends in dentistry . There is AC library and free Wi-Fi, a sterilization unit, a laser department and many more so that we can get accustomed to current trends.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good roller coaster experience of mixed emotions and memories for a lifetime. Absolutely satisfied.

review_content.Placements: I belong to the batch of 2019-20, with a total of 100 students admitted. Everyone from our batch is graduating. We are given good clinical exposure in our hospital. People who are interested in working in rural areas are given a salary and are posted in rural satellite clinics set up by the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the departments are well-equipped with advanced technologies such as advanced microscopes in Oral Pathology, state-of-the-art lab equipment in Prosthodontics like CAD-CAM, digital intraoral scanners, model scanners, 3D printers in Orthodontics, OPG, CBCT in Oral Medicine, and a well-equipped operation theater in Oral Surgery, etc. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled, and the usage of digital dentistry includes Vaidhyo, the online portal of the college where patient data is protected.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good experience and absolutely satisfied with our college.

review_content.Placements: In our college there are a total of 100 students in each batch divided into three sub-batches of 30 students each. Our college has 42 satellite clinics, and after completing the course, we are allowed to work there, which is very helpful and a great opportunity to improve our working skills.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has good infrastructure and great facilities. We have a well-infrastructured library with lots of useful books, lecture halls for classes, and well-infrastructured labs which contain CAD CAM machines, intraoral scanners, CBCT, etc. The hostels are neat and clean, accommodating three persons per room with Wi-Fi.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Good faculty, good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: 100 percent of students are placed in our college with good packages. Vishnu Dental Care employs almost 60-70 percent of our graduates, and there are opportunities for abroad placements as well. We have access to clinical setups and teaching faculties that allow us to work in satellite clinics and prepare for competitive examinations.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities in our college are excellent. The teaching is effective, providing useful information about subjects and clinical skills. The infrastructure is good, and the environment is healthy. Small group teaching is very beneficial. The hostel rooms are good, the food is satisfactory, and we have access to a canteen, ground, and gym.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good college if you want to be a dentist.

review_content.Placements: The college has a few satellite clinics where interns get a chance to work for three to four months and gain clinical exposure. The college does not provide any placements, as no medical or dental college typically offers placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has a good number of facilities, such as labs, a library, Wi-Fi, a playground, clinics, CBCT, CAD-CAM machines, intraoral scanners, and central sterilization ensuring patient safety. The college also has a canteen, hostels, and a mess. There is a doctor available who provides consultation for students.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: Good college infrastructure and facilities are available with wifi, labs, classrooms, and library. Hostel facilities are good with a hygienic environment; quality of food is excellent, with availability of different varieties of food items in the mess and canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Vishnu College has the best technology and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: We have high-speed internet all over campus. For patients, there is a water purifier every 100 meters. Facilities include a gym, tennis court, shuttle court, volleyball court, and cricket ground. Each classroom has only 34 students for small-group teaching.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with our college with respect to quality education.
reviews.review_text: The facilities at Vishnu Dental College like the classrooms, labs and clinic which were separated by respective blocks are good. VDC wifi is available everywhere on campus and can be used for educational purposes. There were messes and canteens about every 50 steps, and the costs were affordable for most of us. We had medical physicians, lab technicians, and psychologists. For those interested in sports, there were practitioners to guide us.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: We have a well-established library and well-equipped labs. The college also has a small group teaching approach, which helps students get more individual attention. The infrastructure includes CBCT, 3D printers, intraoral scanners, and milling machines. The classrooms are well-equipped for hands-on activities, and e-learning is available. The faculty is very experienced and provides guidance at every step. The comprehensive clinic system helps students gain clinical exposure.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty and infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure has good and well maintained buildings. The library is spacious and has a good collection of books. WiFi is available throughout the campus. The mess and canteen provide good quality food. Medical facilities are available on campus. There are facilities for sports and games including a playground. The hostel rooms are spacious and clean. I had a good experience at this college.

reviews.review_heading: Best college with good infrastructure and peaceful campus life.
reviews.review_text: The college has wifi in every lecture hall. The lecture halls have chairs and benches that are arranged in small groups, which makes them more comfortable for students. The college also has a great library that is open from 9am to 10pm. Each department has its own lab. The college also has a canteen that serves fresh food, Maggie points, juice shops, and tea leaf.

reviews.review_heading: Best college - Vishnu Dental College Andhra pradesh.
reviews.review_text: Our college has excellent infrastructure, including WiFi and air-conditioned classrooms, a library, and smart teaching. The mess and canteen provide quality food, and there are many indoor and outdoor sports that students can play, which improves their competitive nature.

reviews.review_heading: College is equipped with qualified doctors, advanced equipment, greenery.
reviews.review_text: The college is equipped with modern infrastructure facilities like wifi networks, well-equipped laboratories with recent advancements in machinery, libraries with a variety of journals and competitive books, learning halls, and computer systems. Hostels are neat and clean, and food is provided on time.

reviews.review_heading: A holistic college experience.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is fully furnished with all amenities and top-notch security for the students. The food is good, and the grounds make us feel at home. There is even a salon and cafes to cater to your needs. The college has state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the latest technologies to aid in holistic modern learning for all students. The clinics are designed for patient comfort and operate very efficiently. All the pre-clinical labs are fully furnished, so students don't have to wait their turn ...

faqs.question: What to do after NEET MDS result?
faqs.answer: Recently, the Government Dental College has released its Round 1 counselling to shortlist the candidates for MDS programs. Once the NEET MDS results are announced, eligible candidates may proceed to participate in the counselling rounds. To engage in theNEET MDS 2025counselling process, candidates must register on the official website of the Medical Counselling Committee (MCC). They are also required to specify their preferred colleges and courses. Typically, four rounds of counselling are conducted, including an online stray vacancy round for admission into the Master of Dental Surgery courses. The seat allocation list is published by MCC based on candidates' marks, ranks, choices filled, seat availability, and other relevant criteria. Successful candidates must report to the designated institute to confirm their admission. If seats become vacant, MCC will organize additional counselling rounds. review_content.Placements: 5 students have been placed last year with a package of 7-9 LPA. I'm also planning to get a placement after I complete my degree. Last year, students were eligible for placements, but I don't know the names of the companies. I do know that they got into nice companies for sure. I haven't done an internship yet. But I'm going to do a summer internship. The department is providing companies where we can work as interns, like SSF, AMS, MORSEL, the Indian Institute of Sugarcane Research, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel room comes with a bed and mattress, a study table and chair, an almirah, an attached bathroom and enough space for you to keep books and other things. The food quality provided is average. There is a 4 floored MIT Central Library with a large number of books as well as e-books. It also has an individual study hall, a group study hall and a library auditorium as well. Classrooms are full AC, with enough space and digital doors. There is a 6-floor Marina Sports Complex with a well-equipped gymnasium, squash courts, swimming pool, etc.

The key differences between the two are as follows:The Data Analyst collects relevant data from various sources to filter and analyze it. The data scientist gathers sizable amounts of structured and unstructured data while performing data mining.Education: To become a data analyst, you can apply with a Bachelor's degree in math, Statistics or a related field. review_summary.college_name: Prasanna School of Public Health Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Biostatistics - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: It is an average college for M.Sc. in Biostatistics.

content.Placements: 65% of students were placed, with the greatest package being 7.5 LPA and the lowest being 3 LPA. The best candidates come from sales firms. The number of people who acquire internships is extremely low, and the responsibilities that are offered vary depending on the firm.
content.Infrastructure: Although the college's infrastructure was good, I didn't think it was worth the money. Students had access to digital classrooms, labs, and Wi-Fi. Academics were the sole priority, and there were no sports facilities accessible. Although it cost a lot to live at the hostel, the food was good.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Biostatistics - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I am very disappointed with the teacher's behavior.

content.Placements: There are about 40% of the students who have placed in our course. The highest package was 7.5 lacs and the average package was 5 lacs and the lowest package was 3.5 lacs. The top roles offered were executive researcher. Several students also got internships.
content.Infrastructure: The furniture of the classrooms and labs is getting old. Classrooms and labs are average and not cleaned daily. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is acceptable. The hostel rooms are small and comfortable. Limited sports facilities are available.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Biostatistics - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Very good college, top-most college.

content.Placements: 5 students have been placed last year with a package of 7-9 LPA. I'm also planning to get a placement after I complete my degree. Last year, students were eligible for placements, but I don't know the names of the companies. I do know that they got into nice companies for sure. I haven't done an internship yet. But I'm going to do a summer internship. The department is providing companies where we can work as interns, like SSF, AMS, MORSEL, the Indian Institute of Sugarcane Research, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel room comes with a bed and mattress, a study table and chair, an almirah, an attached bathroom and enough space for you to keep books and other things. The food quality provided is average. There is a 4 floored MIT Central Library with a large number of books as well as e-books. It also has an individual study hall, a group study hall and a library auditorium as well. Classrooms are full AC, with enough space and digital doors. There is a 6-floor Marina Sports Complex with a well-equipped gymnasium, squash courts, swimming pool, etc.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Biostatistics - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: This college has good faculty members.

content.Placements: The college provides decent placements but students have to find jobs themselves. The package size depends upon the talents of the student it can be 7-10 LPA. Internships were not available but students could work with the faculty in the form of internships.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available for students here at Manipal Academy. Students can play sports, work with faculty, and attend lectures in one single department. Canteens and sitting areas are built in between the departments where students can relax and hill. The food quality in the mess and canteen is very good.

individual_reviews.course: MSW in Community Development - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the best college for MSW in Community Development Course.

content.Placements: 80% of students got placement in our college. Some of the recruiters include Montfort Care, Maruti Suzuki India Ltd., The Hands Foundation, the Ian Institute of Rehabilitation Research, Jims Hospital and more. 75% of students got internships out of college in various fields. The higher-level roles offered are clinical social worker, community outreach worker and more.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities were the main feature I found appealing. Every department at the college has well-equipped classrooms with smart boards. With more than 90 years of history, the college has a rich legacy. The library is good; it has a lot of books that are necessary for every activity and course. It also offers digital features and free Wi-Fi. There is only one female hostel on the campus, and there aren't many spaces available. The hostel's sloppy food is passable but not the finest, and some of the amenities are subpar.

reviews.review_heading: I am very disappointed with the teacher's behavior.
reviews.review_text: The furniture of the classrooms and labs is getting old. Classrooms and labs are average and not cleaned daily. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is acceptable. The hostel rooms are small and comfortable. Limited sports facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Very good college, top-most college.

There is a 6-floor Marina Sports Complex with a well-equip...

reviews.review_heading: This college has good faculty members.

Canteens and sitting areas are built in between the departments where students can relax and hill. The food quality in the mess and canteen is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the best college for MSW in Community Development Course.
reviews.review_text: The facilities were the main feature I found appealing. Every department at the college has well-equipped classrooms with smart boards. With more than 90 years of history, the college has a rich legacy. The library is good; it has a lot of books that are necessary for every activity and course. It also offers digital features and free Wi-Fi. There is only one female hostel on the campus, and there aren't many spaces available. The hostel's sloppy food is passable but not the finest, and some of ...

reviews.review_heading: World class infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course were good. There was Wi-Fi-enabled campus. Library with an excellent collection of books for reference. All essential facilities like fresh drinking water, clean washrooms, and good food were available in the college hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Best College for M.Sc. In Biostatistics Course.
reviews.review_text: The hotel is reasonably priced with good food. There are also goodies such as Wi-Fi, separate bathrooms, and separate single and double rooms. The medical center and library are near the hotel. There are not many restrictions in the hotel that apply to other hotels. College hostels have good security measure.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Prasanna School of Public Health.

college_info.intro: NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce offers 17+ courses across various streams. NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce is known for its flagship MBA, BBA, BCom, MA, BHMTT, BHMCT, PG Diploma and many other programmes. The course duration varies from 1 year to 5 years, depending on the course chosen by the candidate. NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce offers postgraduate courses such as MBA, BBA, BDes, BCom, MA, BHMTT, BHMCT, PG Diploma in the disciplines of Business Design, Human Resource Management, Analytics, Finance, Marketing, Finance, Human Resources, Analytics, Marketing and many more. NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce's highest package during NIMS Jaipur placements 2023 stood at INR 20 LPA. The top recruiters of NIMS University Jaipur placements in 2023 included Goldman Sachs, Dell, TCS and many more. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by the NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce and their respective eligibility and fees:

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, if you do well on the NIMSEE exam and meet the other requirements for admission, you can get admissions to NIMS undergraduate programs even with a 70% score on the 12th board exam.A significant qualifying requirement for admission to NIMS's undergraduate programs, including BBA, BCA, B.Com, and BA (JMC), is a 12th percentage. A minimum of 50% of total points must be earned by general category students in their 12th grade exams from an accredited board.In 12th grade, the minimum pass percentage for reserved categories such as SC/ST is 45%.Students must take the NIMSEE entrance exam, which is administered by the NIMS Institute, in addition to their 12th grade results.Students are shortlisted for a subsequent admissions process based on their NIMSEE score and 12th percentile.
faqs.question: Can I get into NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce with 70% in class 12th?

reviews_list.review_title: NIMS University is best fro MBA course.

review_content.Placements: Around 90% of students are placed. The highest salary package offered ranges from 15 LPA - 35 LPA and the lowest salary package offered ranges from 2 LPA- 9 LPA. Top companies are Google, Deloitte, Cognizant, and others. Marketing manager, financial manager, and other top positions are available.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our university infrastructure is first-rate. Its climate is healthy and natural. Students feel at ease in spacious classrooms. Each department has its library. Library has all of the top authors' reference books available. There are excellent labs with equipment available for medical students. There are 14 departments in all at NIMS.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, it's a fine college with all facilities.

review_content.Placements: 80 out of 100 students get placed. The highest salary is 16 LPA, the lowest is 5 LPA, and the average is 8 LPA. All management-related roles such as consulting, product management, sales and marketing, general management, and operations are considered (with salaries typically around 16 LPA). All students have done internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is quite good. The campus has its own playgrounds, auditorium, faculty building, and residential area, with a significant amount of greenery. Because of this greenery, one can often see peacocks and other animals and birds wandering throughout the campus.

overview_faqs.answer: NIMS University, located in Jaipur, Rajasthan, is a private university that offers various programs across multiple disciplines, including management and commerce. Here is some information about the management and commerce programs at NIMS University:Courses and Programs: NIMS University offers undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programs in management and commerce. These programs cover a wide range of specializations, including finance, human resource management, marketing, international business, supply chain management, and more. The university provides both traditional classroom-based programs as well as distance learning options.Faculty: NIMS University has a diverse and experienced faculty consisting of professors, researchers, and industry professionals. The faculty members aim to impart knowledge, mentor students, and contribute to research and publications in their respective fields. They bring practical insights into the classroom to enhance the learning experience.Infr

review_summary.college_name: NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Aviation Management - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty members are here. They prepare us for interviews and internships.

content.Placements: NIMS University provides 100% placements to students. Top companies like Google, Amazon, Indigo, Oyo, and Bajaj Finance visit the college for placements. The university also provides paid internships to students. Students got a job from companies like Oyo, etc., as a consultant manager, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are best here as they provide fully AC and furnished rooms to students. It provides 3 sharing rooms with 3 beds, 3 study tables, and 3 separate almirahs for students. It also provides Wi-Fi and a cold water filter for students. The hostel also contains a mess in which food is served to the students of the best quality.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Event Management - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is good college for those who want to earn their degree easily, and its infrastructure is good.

content.Placements: Around 60% of students in my course get placed during the recruitment drive. The highest package is 5 LPA, while the lowest is 2 LPA, with an average package of 3 LPA. The top recruiting companies are TCS, Just Dial, Neelam Aqua, etc. The most common roles offered are in finance, sales, and marketing.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure at my college is very good. They provide a library and smart classrooms with air conditioning and Wi-Fi. The service in the hostel is on the point, they provide water heaters and water coolers on every floor. The food in the mess is above average. There is a sports complex that includes a basketball court, lawn tennis court, gym, and badminton courts.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: NIMS University is best fro MBA course.

content.Placements: Around 90% of students are placed. The highest salary package offered ranges from 15 LPA - 35 LPA and the lowest salary package offered ranges from 2 LPA- 9 LPA. Top companies are Google, Deloitte, Cognizant, and others. Marketing manager, financial manager, and other top positions are available.
content.Infrastructure: Our university infrastructure is first-rate. Its climate is healthy and natural. Students feel at ease in spacious classrooms. Each department has its library. Library has all of the top authors' reference books available. There are excellent labs with equipment available for medical students. There are 14 departments in all at NIMS.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Overall, it's a fine college with all facilities.

content.Placements: 80 out of 100 students get placed. The highest salary is 16 LPA, the lowest is 5 LPA, and the average is 8 LPA. All management-related roles such as consulting, product management, sales and marketing, general management, and operations are considered (with salaries typically around 16 LPA). All students have done internships.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is quite good. The campus has its own playgrounds, auditorium, faculty building, and residential area, with a significant amount of greenery. faqs.question: What is the process of admission for BBA at NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce?
faqs.answer: Candidates looking forward to getting admission to NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce for BBA must have passed Class 12 exam with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate in the case of students belonging to reserved category) in the qualifying exam. Those who apply need to submit their documents. NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce follows a six-step admission process. The same is mentioned below:Visit the official website of NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce or the NIMS University.Fill out the form and upload all the relevant documents.Make payment for the application form.Get the online receipt of the online application form submitted on the official website.The admission team will verify all the documents received by them.Pay the academic fee and confirm your seat at the institute.

faqs.question: When are NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce application forms out?
faqs.answer: MBA application forms are available in July and August, while NIMSEE registration for UG programs, such as BBA, begins in December, and admission applications to the NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce must be submitted by April or May. They accept CAT/MAT, etc. scores for the MBA program. MBA application forms are available online on the institute's website in July and August. Applications and registration forms for NIMSEE are typically made available in December.The entrance exam takes place between January and February. The outcome is released in March. The entire application process, which includes registering for the NIMSEE, taking the entrance exam, and applying for admission, ends in May or June for NIMS undergraduate programs.

faqs.question: Can I get into NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce with 70% in class 12th?
faqs.answer: Yes, if you do well on the NIMSEE exam and meet the other requirements for admission, you can get admissions to NIMS undergraduate programs even with a 70% score on the 12th board exam.A significant qualifying requirement for admission to NIMS's undergraduate programs, including BBA, BCA, B.Com, and BA (JMC), is a 12th percentage. A minimum of 50% of total points must be earned by general category students in their 12th grade exams from an accredited board.In 12th grade, the minimum pass percentage for reserved categories such as SC/ST is 45%.Students must take the NIMSEE entrance exam, which is administered by the NIMS Institute, in addition to their 12th grade results.Students are shortlisted for a subsequent admissions process based on their NIMSEE score and 12th percentile.

faqs.question: Which branch is best in BBA at NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce?
faqs.answer: The best NIMS branch to get a well-rounded business education is the BBA in Marketing and Analytics. Advertising, sales, customer behavior, competitive analysis, etc. are the main topics of BBA marketing. It prepares people for careers in media planning, digital marketing, brand/product management, etc. Organizational development, labor laws, hiring, training, and other topics are covered in BBA HR. Key positions include recruitment specialist and HR manager. Data analysis, machine learning, and visualization are all part of BBA analytics. Two important career options are business analyst and data scientist. The BBA in Marketing and BBA in Analytics appear to be the best specializations among the options available, taking into account the demands of the industry today and in the future.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty members are here. They prepare us for interviews and internships.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are best here as they provide fully AC and furnished rooms to students. It provides 3 sharing rooms with 3 beds, 3 study tables, and 3 separate almirahs for students. It also provides Wi-Fi and a cold water filter for students. The hostel also contains a mess in which food is served to the students of the best quality.

reviews.review_heading: It is good college for those who want to earn their degree easily, and its infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at my college is very good. They provide a library and smart classrooms with air conditioning and Wi-Fi. The service in the hostel is on the point, they provide water heaters and water coolers on every floor. The food in the mess is above average. There is a sports complex that includes a basketball court, lawn tennis court, gym, and badminton courts.

reviews.review_heading: NIMS University is best fro MBA course.
reviews.review_text: Our university infrastructure is first-rate. Its climate is healthy and natural. Students feel at ease in spacious classrooms. Each department has its library. Library has all of the top authors' reference books available. There are excellent labs with equipment available for medical students. There are 14 departments in all at NIMS.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it's a fine college with all facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is quite good. The campus has its own playgrounds, auditorium, faculty building, and residential area, with a significant amount of greenery. Because of this greenery, one can often see peacocks and other animals and birds wandering throughout the campus.

reviews.review_heading: NIMS is the best university, that you can visit.
reviews.review_text: The building of the college is very good. NIMS provides projectors and the best quality seats in all the classes, as well as the lab in which we perform our textile projects and a machine lab for our stitching project. Hostels also have good infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: According to me, NIMS College is good. Good faculty and placements are provided.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are present, like Wi-Fi, classrooms, library, and good infrastructure. Hostel facilities are good; food quality is also good. Medical facilities are also available because this is a medical college. For sports, a gym and basketball ground are present, and games like Spardha are organized by the college.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for MBA.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite decent. This is a good college. There are classrooms, libraries, transport facilities, conference rooms, auditoriums. Every year some events are done and some celebrations for special days. Hostel is good and hygienic food is provided in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Good university with vast facilities.
reviews.review_text: Classes are well-equipped with a microphone and speaker, a projector for digital learning, and the best faculty members to support you and your educational needs. Day scholar but libraries and hostels are well-equipped with air conditioning and books with good food.

reviews.review_heading: Review on NIMS university.
reviews.review_text: In our college, smart classrooms, libraries, and Wi-Fi facilities are available. In our hostel unlimited water supply, proper electricity and in mess good quality of food is available etc. In the sports gym, a swimming pool, volleyball court, and basketball court are available for students.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college, because of the activities; Good placement; Good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: In terms of infrastructure, NIMS is one of the best colleges in the country, matching international standard. It had upgraded its classroom facilities, teaching with modern tools and technology. The college had air conditioned classrooms, Wi-Fi, and library.

reviews.review_heading: You'll like the college at first after seeing its campus and functions.
reviews.review_text: Our classrooms are available, but there is no Wi-Fi available. Facilities in the hostel are very average. Regardless of the hostel, I would recommend taking a PG. The food served in the hostel mess is not good, and you don't want to eat food in the mess. The grounds for sports are useless.

reviews.review_heading: Over-all good for an average student.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi for student use. They provide only 35mb for 1 day for students. Wi-Fi is available for only teachers and office use. And the library is well furnished. And my hostel facility is over all average. The quality of food and canteen is also average.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with our college faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is excellent. It has a natural, healthy climate. Classrooms are huge and students feel comfortable. We have departmental libraries. You can get all the reference books of the best authors in the library. For medical students, good labs are available with machines. NIMS has a total of 14 departments.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best and number 1 institute ever.
reviews.review_text: Our college has world class infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is better than other colleges. Medical facilities are very good on campus. The hostel is very good. Campus life is good. If you live in the hostel, then your campus life would be very good. You will enjoy it very much.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: I have enjoyed my 4 years in RGIT, and I had the best time on campus.

review_content.Placements: I was in computer science student, and we had 2 sections. The highest strength is recorded in CSE followed by biomedical engineering. There were no placements in 2020 and 2021. I think it was due to covid-19 situation. Now, there might be placements from this year.
review_content.Infrastructure: I am a day scholar, but some of my friends are from Kerala. They used to stay in the hostel. They always used to say that the hostel food was bad. Rooms are always clean and have separate restrooms. They had to follow hostel timings, and they were not allowed to go out after 9 pm.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied with the off-course faculty and their behaviour.

review_content.Placements: The college doesn't provide any placement opportunities. Sometimes, local business people visit the college to hire students. So they don't even conduct any placement drives. Whenever a company visit the college, they just go back without hiring any student. They organise a job fair which is useless, and this is a business trick to make money.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good, but there is no playground. It's difficult to survive in the college for four years. Classrooms and labs are in the worst condition. I suggest you be careful when you choose a college. The equipment in the labs is good, and all the equipment is useless.

overview_faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
overview_faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

review_summary.college_name: RGC - Rajiv Gandhi Group of Institution Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is worth reading in this college. All teachers and staff members are supportive and friendly.

content.Placements: There are around 73 students in our class. The highest salary package offered is about 9 LPA, and the average salary package offered is 4 LPA. Around 85% of the students got internships from our course because it is a must and in the final semester it carries marks.
content.Infrastructure: ]Our college has a good infrastructure. There is a small canteen which is near the ground. He prepares all the items which are good for our health and it is hygienic as well. There is no Wi-Fi connectivity in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Review of RGC - Rajiv Gandhi Group of Institution.

content.Placements: According to my knowledge, 60% of students got placed in computer science and engineering department. The annual package offered was around 1.5 to 3 LPA. Some students got seats through CET. It was around 70,000 for them. There were different branches in engineering, like mechanical, computer science, biomedical, civil engineering etc.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good. The college has a library, from where we can take books, read them and even take them home. Later, we have to return them. Our classrooms are good. There are many different auditoriums for different branches. Labs are not fully equipped.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I have enjoyed my 4 years in RGIT, and I had the best time on campus.

content.Placements: I was in computer science student, and we had 2 sections. The highest strength is recorded in CSE followed by biomedical engineering. There were no placements in 2020 and 2021. I think it was due to covid-19 situation. Now, there might be placements from this year.
content.Infrastructure: I am a day scholar, but some of my friends are from Kerala. They used to stay in the hostel. They always used to say that the hostel food was bad. Rooms are always clean and have separate restrooms. They had to follow hostel timings, and they were not allowed to go out after 9 pm.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with the off-course faculty and their behaviour.

content.Placements: The college doesn't provide any placement opportunities. Sometimes, local business people visit the college to hire students. So they don't even conduct any placement drives. Whenever a company visit the college, they just go back without hiring any student. They organise a job fair which is useless, and this is a business trick to make money.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good, but there is no playground. It's difficult to survive in the college for four years. Classrooms and labs are in the worst condition. I suggest you be careful when you choose a college. The equipment in the labs is good, and all the equipment is useless.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied by the Infrastructure of college,Good faculties and average Placements.

content.Placements: Placements for my batch has not yet started. But for my seniors batch the placements was held. And only 5 students were selected out of 60. The highest average salary was offered 3,00000 and the lowest was about 150000. The companies visited our campus for placements are Wipro, Infosys, IBM, and several other companies also. Different kinds of roles were offered to the selected members like Testing, Software development, Web desighee etc. There are no internships given to the students. And there is no proper placement cell in the college. In my opinion placements in our college are not much useful for students. I think in future the placements will be given more and it will be improved.

reviews_list.review_title: I like Vikrant Institute of Technology and Management, Indore. The college is the best.

review_content.Placements: The college has a placement cell but placements for BBA students are not very strong. Most recruitment opportunities are for engineering and technical courses rather than commerce. Some local and mid-level companies visit for placements. The salary package ranges from 2-5 LPA. Internships are not actively provided by the college, so students need to find them on their own through external sources.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is well-maintained with spacious classrooms equipped with projectors. The environment is decent for study. The library has a good collection of books. Basic facilities are available. It could be updated for all students.

reviews_list.review_title: The college of satisfaction.

review_content.Placements: First, talking about placements, it’s really random and truly depends on the students. There's an M.Tech student who was placed at 48 LPA and now at 56 LPA, and has been recommended for opportunities outside India. The faculty is very helpful, supporting both first-year and final-year students. The lowest offer by TCS is approximately 3 LPA to 6 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The entire campus is covered with free high-speed Wi-Fi, with computer labs on all three floors and big classrooms. There are basic medical facilities, and since Vikrant runs a cricket club, sports are above average. The library is good, the canteen is average, and games are similar to those in other colleges.

overview_faqs.question: Is Vikrant Group of Institutions, Indore a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Vikrant Group of Institutions, Indore is a reputed institute for BBA, B.Com, Certificate, UG Diploma, BCA, B.Sc., M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, After 1th Diploma, B.Tech. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Business & Management Studies, Accounting & Commerce, Medicine & Health Sciences, IT & Software, Nursing, Engineering. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Vikrant Group of Institutions, Indore has a review rating of 4.6 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 4.6 on campuslife, 4.5 on placements, 4.7 on faculty and 4.6 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Vikrant Institute of Technology and Management, Indore Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Infrastructure, faculty members, placements, and all other things in college are below average.

content.Placements: I don't think anybody in our batch gets placed except for 2-3 students. The average package ranges from 2-3 LPA. Very few companies came for placements that too are less known like uBuddy. Around 60% of students got internships from our course in NGO-based and sales companies and that too poorly.
content.Infrastructure: Overall, the infrastructure of the college is below average and not very good. There is no Wi-Fi facility. The library does not have informative books and only has course-related books. There is no hostel facility and the canteen is just average with normal food quality and not any difference in it. It gives false claims of providing sports and games. It only has volleyball, cricket, and chess, and that too they don't provide it.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure and facilities are good.

content.Placements: 75% of students were placed in our course. Top multinational companies recruited our students. N90% of students got internships from multinational companies like Eicher, Force Motors, etc. Companies gave good packages, and the highest package was 15 LPA in our course.
content.Infrastructure: In Vikrant Institute of Technology and Management, there was good infrastructure and well-maintained classrooms was available. Wi-Fi was available, labs were well-maintained,and also in our courseWorkshops were also available for practicals and practice. A well-maintained library was also available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I like Vikrant Institute of Technology and Management, Indore. The college is the best.

content.Placements: The college has a placement cell but placements for BBA students are not very strong. Most recruitment opportunities are for engineering and technical courses rather than commerce. Some local and mid-level companies visit for placements. The salary package ranges from 2-5 LPA. Internships are not actively provided by the college, so students need to find them on their own through external sources.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is well-maintained with spacious classrooms equipped with projectors. The environment is decent for study. The library has a good collection of books. Basic facilities are available. It could be updated for all students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college of satisfaction.

content.Placements: First, talking about placements, it’s really random and truly depends on the students. There's an M.Tech student who was placed at 48 LPA and now at 56 LPA, and has been recommended for opportunities outside India. The faculty is very helpful, supporting both first-year and final-year students. The lowest offer by TCS is approximately 3 LPA to 6 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The entire campus is covered with free high-speed Wi-Fi, with computer labs on all three floors and big classrooms. There are basic medical facilities, and since Vikrant runs a cricket club, sports are above average. The library is good, the canteen is average, and games are similar to those in other colleges.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: An honest review of Vikrant group of institutions.

content.Placements: Placement of the Vikrant group of institutions are quite good. In engineering & management students there will be a good placement offer companies like Mahindra & Mahindra, Tata Motors, Eicher, VE commercials, Indian oil, Jio, Binge, Ashok Leyland, Infosys, UltraTech, Aditya Birla Group, etc. The average package is around 4.6 LPA; the highest package is around 20 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: An excellent educational institutions has to have good infrastructure. Vikrant group of institutions has a great infrastructure; it's about 12 acres total area, in which there is a separate engineering campus, management campus, & nursing campus. All these campus have a separate library also for students to easily get into there academics. In sports, there is a cricket ground, volleyball ground & basketball ground also. In the engineering campus, there is a small tennis court also. There is an auditorium hall for student presentations, teacher-student interaction, video lectures, guest lecturers, etc.
