reviews_list.review_title: College is good for engineering and has many facilities and good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: 60 percent of students were placed by the college. The highest package is 18 Lacs, the lowest was 6 Lacs, and the average package was 8 Lacs. Top recruiter companies are TCS, Wipro, Accenture, and IBM. 60 percent got internships by the college in TCS. Top roles were software engineering posts.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides us Wi-Fi on campus, well-equipped labs, classrooms, and a library full of modern books. The hostel is well-equipped with Wi-Fi, clean rooms, and hygienic food. Sometimes the food is not tasty, but overall, it is good for students to live in. Full medical facilities are provided by the college, and many sports and games are held in the hostel for students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied by my college faculty, good placement, and good infrastructure of college and hostel.

review_content.Placements: About 50 percent of students were placed from my CSE course. The highest package offered in my course is 13 Lacs and the lowest is 4 Lacs, with the average package being about 5 to 6 Lacs. Top recruiting companies for my course are TCS, INFOSYS, and TECH MAHINDRA. About 55 percent of students got internships in TCS and INFOSYS. Top roles offered by my CSE course are Software Developer, Web Developer, Cybersecurity, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available in my CSE course are air-conditioned classrooms and interaction halls, a high-speed Wi-Fi network for the entire campus, well-facilitated labs, and a library. The hostel facilities are clean and hygienic, with a high-speed Wi-Fi network, 24-hour electricity and water supply, clean rooms, and a clean mess. The food is not better in taste, but you can manage with it. The canteen is open 24 hours and is well-maintained. Medical facilities are available in both the hostel and college, and sports and games are conducted on time.

course_faqs.answer: Global Institutes offers a two-year MBA course under the affiliation of IKG Punjab Technical University, Jalandhar, which is also approved by AICTE. Candidates completing this course will receive a final PG degree of MBA from IKGPTU. At Global Institutes, candidates can pursue MBA course across three specialisations, namely Marketing, Finance and Human Resource. course_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for the MBA course is INR 1.20 lakh at Global Institutes. Candidates must have a Bachelor's degree of minimum 3 years in any discipline from UGC approved University to be able to apply for this course.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Overall the college is good. All services are good, except mess.

content.Placements: In our college, mainly placements are held only in the final year semester. The highest package according to me offered is 8 LPA. There are no placements held yet for the pharmacy. Companies like Aditya Birla Group, Arrow, etc., gave placement to students.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel facilities are good, electricity is available 24/7, and 24/7 water facility is available. The only bad thing which I can say about is mess. The food quality is poor and the limited food items are available in mess and repeated menu. The infrastructure of the campus is good. I would rate it 9.5/10, it is small but beautiful enough.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good placement in 2024.

content.Placements: Fifty percent of students were placed in my course. The highest package is Rs 12 lac, the lowest package is Rs 4.5 lac, and the average package is Rs 2.5 lac offered in my course. Sixty-five percent had internships. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Axis Bank, HDFC Bank, Amazon, and Flipkart.
content.Infrastructure: Many facilities are on campus: a badminton court, cricket ground, football, basketball. All are under CCTV camera on campus. A food court is available here. Wi-Fi is a little weak. Labs are high-tech, classrooms have air conditioning, and there are four libraries. Medical facilities are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with the classroom facilities.

content.Placements: About 60 percent of students get placed through the college from this course. The highest package is 12 LPA, the lowest package is 3 LPA, and the average package is 5 LPA. IBT, TCS, Tech Mahindra, Aditya Birla Group are the companies that visit here mostly. 40 percent of students from this course get their internship through the college at Infosys, Tata, etc. You can be a data analyst, full-stack developer, software developer, etc., from the CSE department.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities like Wi-Fi availability, AC classrooms, AC labs, AC library, and large classrooms are available. The hostel is much better for seniors than juniors, as 5 students have to share a single room in the junior hostel, while 4 share in the senior hostel. Regular cleanliness is maintained in both, and Wi-Fi is available all over the hostels. The most challenging thing is the mess food, as you may not like the taste, but you can buy fast food through the college canteens. The medical dispensary is present in the college, and many games and sports are conducted each semester.

paragraphs: Global Institutes admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, Global Institutes considers scores in ICSE, ISC, and CBSE 10th for admission to specific courses.Global Institutesoffers courses at the UG, PG and After 10th levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 2 years - 3 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 45,728 - 3,81,068. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 1,20,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

faqs.answer: Courses offerred by Global Institutes are approved by eminent Government bodies like AICTE. The combined seats available for courses offered at Global Institutes goes up to 924.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Global Institutes for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
Global Institutes has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.Sc.Those candidates who have passed their Matriculation examination AND have also passed Three Year Diploma in any Trade from Punjab State Board of Technical Education & Industrial Training, Chandigarh or such Examination from any other recognised State Board of Technical Education, or Two Year diploma in Pharmacy or Medical Lab Technology after 10+2 recognized by any state board.MCACandidates must have passed BCA/Bachelor Degree in Computer Science Engineering or equivalent Degree. 
OR
Candidates must have passed B.Sc./ B.Com./ B.A. with Mathematics at 10+2 level or at Graduated Level (with additional bridge courses as per the norms of the concerned University) 
Candidate must have obtained at least 50% (45% in case of candidate belonging to reserved category) in the qualifying Examination.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed Diploma in relevant stream from a recognized Institute.

placement_data.title: Global Institutes Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The institute concluded its placement drive for the Class of 2023. As per the latest report, the highest package offered during Global Institute Amritsar placement 2023 stood at INR 30 LPA. Further, the participating recruiters offered over 2000 placements to various courses of the batch 2023 . The top recruiters of Global Group of Institute Amritsar in 2023 included Accenture, LG, Cognizant, Amazon, Dell, HCL, ICICI Bank, Infosys, etc.

hostel.description: Hostel facility is available for both boys and girls. All the rooms are spacious, well ventilated, illuminated, air-cooled and well furnished. Each room has an attached bathroom with hot water facility.  24 hours power backup and Wi-Fi internet connectivity (16 MBPS) supplements the hostel life.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Volley Ball, Table Tennis, Hockey

hostel.description: Hostel facility is available for both boys and girls. All the rooms are spacious, well ventilated, illuminated, air-cooled and well furnished. Each room has an attached bathroom with hot water facility.  24 hours power backup and Wi-Fi internet connectivity (16 MBPS) supplements the hostel life.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Volley Ball, Table Tennis, Hockey

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Electronics Lab, Mechanical Lab, Physics Lab

reviews.review_heading: Overall the college is good. All services are good, except mess.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities are good, electricity is available 24/7, and 24/7 water facility is available. The only bad thing which I can say about is mess. The food quality is poor and the limited food items are available in mess and repeated menu. The infrastructure of the campus is good. I would rate it 9.5/10, it is small but beautiful enough.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement in 2024.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities are on campus: a badminton court, cricket ground, football, basketball. All are under CCTV camera on campus. A food court is available here. Wi-Fi is a little weak. Labs are high-tech, classrooms have air conditioning, and there are four libraries. Medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: College is good for engineering and has many facilities and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college provides us Wi-Fi on campus, well-equipped labs, classrooms, and a library full of modern books. The hostel is well-equipped with Wi-Fi, clean rooms, and hygienic food. Sometimes the food is not tasty, but overall, it is good for students to live in. Full medical facilities are provided by the college, and many sports and games are held in the hostel for students.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied by my college faculty, good placement, and good infrastructure of college and hostel.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in my CSE course are air-conditioned classrooms and interaction halls, a high-speed Wi-Fi network for the entire campus, well-facilitated labs, and a library. The hostel facilities are clean and hygienic, with a high-speed Wi-Fi network, 24-hour electricity and water supply, clean rooms, and a clean mess. The food is not better in taste, but you can manage with it. The canteen is open 24 hours and is well-maintained. Medical facilities are available i...

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the classroom facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like Wi-Fi availability, AC classrooms, AC labs, AC library, and large classrooms are available. The hostel is much better for seniors than juniors, as 5 students have to share a single room in the junior hostel, while 4 share in the senior hostel. Regular cleanliness is maintained in both, and Wi-Fi is available all over the hostels. The most challenging thing is the mess food, as you may not like the taste, but you can buy fast food through the college canteens. The medical dispensa...

reviews.review_heading: Satisfiable institute at a low budget.
reviews.review_text: The overall facilities and infrastructure are well-maintained. It provides air-conditioned classrooms, air-conditioned labs, and an air-conditioned library. Wi-Fi is available all over the campus. The hostel rooms are much better as cleanliness is maintained on a regular basis. A maximum of four students stay in a single room which could be uncomfortable for a few but when students become senior then they have to live with 3 students. The quality of food is not much better and there is the avail...

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with my college experience.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities and infrastructure are available in my college as all classes are air-conditioned, there is availability of Wi-Fi all over the campus, AC labs and a library are available. 24/7 Wi-Fi is available in the hostel, and all the rooms are well maintained, but the quality of food in the mess is not much better, although you can have some fast food in the college canteen. Medical facilities are available in the college as well as the hostel. Conducting sports and games are held here.

reviews.review_heading: The college is overall better at a low budget
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of our institution are good. The entire campus is air-conditioned, and Wi-Fi is available throughout. The hostel quality is also good; all rooms have coolers and fans, and Wi-Fi is accessible. However, the quality of food in the mess could be improved. Medical facilities are available, and sports and games are organized.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college faculty and staff.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure for the CSE department are good, as all classrooms are air-conditioned. There is Wi-Fi availability all over the campus, and AC labs and an AC library are available. The hostel facilities are much better than expected, with all-time Wi-Fi access and clean rooms. However, the quality of food in the mess is not great, but you can find fast food in the college canteen. Medical facilities are available in both the hostel and college, and sports and games are organiz...

reviews.review_heading: Faculty, facilities, exams, good food, festivals were awesome and enjoyable in this institute.
reviews.review_text: The college provides good facilities and tasty food. Global Group of Institutes ranks as one of the best engineering, management, pharmacy colleges in Punjab, North India situated at Amritsar as they bequeath their students with a plethora of opportunities in their way to success. The institute has maintained its reputation for excellence in many disciplines. The prior reason being the quality of education with added excellence over well-groomed syllabus and eminence of teachers. Further, the ad...

reviews.review_heading: It's a commendable place in terms of infrastructure, placements and overall growth of students.
reviews.review_text: Our college has the best infrastructure among other colleges in Amritsar. There are quality air-conditioned classrooms, a nice and clean hostel, cricket ground, football ground and well-equipped labs. You can find ATM, Nescafe, juice bar, etc., on the college premises. The library contains all the books. During my entire college tenure, I have not bought any books, as you can issue books from the college library.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best for providing quality education in Amritsar.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Global Institutes is overall really amazing. Every classroom is equipped with audio and visual aids. Moreover, every classroom has comfortable seats and a very interactive structure where professors can easily interact with every student. Moreover, there are computer labs which contain I5 and I7 processors, which are really very fast, helpful and provide a better programming experience. The conference hall, auditorium and practical labs are highly furnished and well maintai...

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best for career building.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is pretty good, and one can give a five-star rating to it. The college provides facilities like benches, Wi-Fi, canteens, a projector in the class, auditorium and library. There is a green environment around the campus. All classrooms are air-conditioned, and it has well-equipped amenities. All labs are fully furnished, and it has all types of equipment.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides quality education, excellent placements, modern and the best infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of GGI, Amritsar, is quite good. Every block is air-conditioned, and almost all lecture halls have world-class amenities. The library is huge, and it is fully air-conditioned and Wi-Fi enabled. Hostel life is quite good, and the food and mess facilities are great. The rooms are well ventilated. Almost all the sports facilities are available at the college, along with a well-equipped gymnasium.

reviews.review_heading: Global Institutes, Amritsar, has the best infrastructure, placements and management.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is lush green and has all the necessary facilities for students, like Wi-Fi in all the blocks, sports arena, well-equipped gymnasium, canteen, medical facilities, well-equipped labs, well-ventilated rooms in the hostel, amazing food in the mess etc. We have a supportive environment in the hostel. We have great bus facilities for day scholars.

The application process is conducted online. Candidates must contact the admission office for more details.

B.Sc. at St John's National Academy of Health Sciences is offered for 3 years in 1 specialisation. college_info.college_name: Mahadevappa Rampure Medical College: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Cutoff, Reviews

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Mahadevappa Rampure Medical College:

reviews_list.review_title: Very good college for medical course with good faculty and good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Mahadevappa Rampura Medical College is a very repetitive college located in Gulbarga. Most of the doctors qualified from this college report that more than 50% of students will pass from the course and get a job.
review_content.Infrastructure: The faculty is good, and the teachers are very experienced, having completed both MBBS and MD. Both practical and theory classes are conducted, and the quality of the facilities, including the hostel, library, mess, canteen, and sports, is given importance.
review_content.Faculty: The teachers are very helpful and qualified; they are knowledgeable. This course is related to the medical field, and students contribute to society through social service based on their knowledge. Semester exams are very easy to pass, but we have to study regularly.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Good faculty with a pretty average campus and basic infrastructure, with a good pass percentage.

review_content.Placements: It is a medical college. Most of the students prefer studying MD rather than working immediately after MBBS. This college has a compulsory 1-year internship as given by the board. This internship is paid. If we want to get placed and work immediately after MBBS, it is very easy to get a job in a hospital or set up a clinic.
review_content.Infrastructure: This college is a 70-year-old college with good and experienced faculty. It has some of the best doctors in the city for all the clinical subjects. It has limited infrastructure as it is an old campus. The hostel has average facilities. There are 2 canteens on the campus, one in the college and one in the hospital. There are sports and games on the campus, from indoor to outdoor. It has annual sports competitions and intercollege competitions.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Great faculty with poor facilities. Needs to focus on infrastructure maintenance and administration.

review_content.Placements: Placement rate is around average as not many opt for job immediately after MBBS and prepare for PG instead. Chances are you'll be taken up by clinics and small scale hospitals after MBBS to learn without much salary but getting experience instead. Skills taught by the college itself is not enough for landing a job and will have to go that extra mile with dedication to land a satisfactory one. Salaries range about 20,000 to 30,000 on starting and depends on your skill set.
review_content.Infrastructure: Not all classrooms are made the same with facilities. Only 3-4 can be classified as proper classrooms with comfortable benches. No Wi-Fi facility available for study/research. Library is spacious with too many books on display but only handful books from each subject are actually given to read. Not allowed to issue books outside library though. Boy’s hostel is absolutely worse. Infact calling it the worse is an understatement. Totally unhygienic and administration has given up. There's literally no mess or any other facility other than a single B.Ed in the room. Absolutely filthy bathrooms along with cobwebs since 2001.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: College is good in terms of staff.

content.Placements: Since it is medical field the chances of placements depend upon whether the person has pursued higher degrees or not. If we have good degrees in post-graduate examinations we have good and plenty amount of chances of jobs. Internships are obviously part of the degree.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of this college is still in developing mode. Classrooms are good. Library is spacious and has good environment for studies. Hostel options are also available. This college has good canteen. For sports, we have separate areas especially badminton and table tennis courts.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college for students who are nearby and want to study.

content.Placements: Placement opportunities play a vital role in shaping careers offering students a platform to showcase their skills and gain industry exposure. They bridge the gap between academic knowledge and real world application to foster confidence and open doors rewarding professional growth.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure for both courses and hostels is thoughtfully designed, providing an excellent learning and living environment. We have state-of-the-art classrooms, well-equipped labs and libraries that enhance academic experiences while comfortable. Hostels are well-maintained to ensure a homely atmosphere, fostering growth and productivity.

During the Mahadevappa Rampure Medical College Karnataka NEET UG cutoff 2025, the closing rank for MBBS admission is 72581 for the General Home State Quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same stood at 128014.

In this section, Mahadevappa Rampure Medical College Karnataka NEET UG cutoff 2025 is available, alongside the last round cutoff of 2024 and 2023 for the general category students. Admission to the MBBS courses is done based on the NEET UG exam ranks, followed by the Karnataka NEET UG counselling process to avail a seat at Mahadevappa Rampure Medical College. As per this year’s cutoff, the General Home State quota stands at a cutoff rank of 72581 for MBBS.

reviews_list.review_title: A good government college in city of education -sikar of Rajasthan.

review_content.Placements: This is my first session in this college. So right now I have no knowledge about its placement and internship courses but yes the college head has approved that within few years they will add the PG course also along with a attach hospital of 300 beds in which students can practice.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of my college is super awesome. Being a government medical college, it really looks like a private college with high tech, fully air conditioned lecture halls with digital equipment for studies. It has separate labs for every department like pharmacology, microbiology, physiology, anatomy. This college has a super big sized library and reading room for those who want peaceful place for studies. It's is having two dissection hall with proper availability of cadaver and a museum with sufficient specimen for spotting purpose. It is having separate mess area for girls, boys and faculty members which satisfy optimum food related needs with hygiene. Currently various courts for sports like (basketball, volleyball, cricket, table tennis, badminton)purpose are under construction and it will be available within 2-3 months. Then it is having two ambulance with proper medical facilities which is available 24/7 to all the needy one in the campus. Complete campus is surrounded by well grown gardens with different plants and trees. The best thing which I like about this college is that it is situated far away from major city crowd which really gives soothing vibes. Near to this college there is a proper availability of police station, medical and general store and many more shops along with transport facility. It is having separate hostels for girls and boys, resident doctors with proper facility for drinking water, lifts, recreation hall, camera for safety etc. Hostels are totally safe as there is full time duty of guards and care taker there along with proper, strict time of entry and exist along with proper entry.

reviews_list.review_title: To be a good IMG, SK GMC SIKAR would be a good opportunity.

review_content.Placements: There is a batch of 100 students in this college each year. The package basically lies in a range of 65k to 95k after the completion of MBBS. Basically after completing MBBS and service bond of 2 years you can work anywhere you want. About 60% of the MBBS passout students after completing internship and service bond they work of different private sector hospital franchise or companies as general doctor.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel, mess and lab all are inside the college campus. Wi-Fi is mostly not present in the hostel but as you want you can manage by yourself. There is a free Wi-Fi present in the academic block so you can use it. The infrastructure and buildings are well maintain there are garden and other sports ground in the college present. There is a cooperative mess maintened in college with a price of 4500 rupees. There are single, double and triple seater room present. Single seater rooms are with attached bathroom.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It has a great infrastructure with latest technologies.

content.Placements: As it is a government medical college, it provides you with the opportunity of an internship in its attached hospital. A multi-specialty hospital is also under construction and is to be attached to the college. The salary for the internship is around Rs. 17,000 per month to Rs. 18,000 per month. The salary for being selected as a junior resident is Rs. 50,000 per month to Rs. 60,000 per month. Salaries for the higher posts also tend to be around 1.5 lakh per month.
content.Infrastructure: The e-library is open from 10 a.m. to 4 p.m. There is a study library with separate desks and charging ports, cabin-like arrangements, and separate reading rooms for combined studies. Classrooms are completely digital. Wi-Fi is available in the academic areas. The whole academic area, classroom, and library are air-conditioned. The playground has a basketball court, a volleyball court, an indoor badminton court, cricket nets, and lawn tennis. The mess has good quality food for Rs. 4,000 per month. The canteen is open 24 hours.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2025

There is a big library attached with a big reading room. Hostels are also good, and each student has separate room.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is worth the money paid.

review_content.Placements: Many students got placed in our college. The salary package offered was 1 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was good. Our labs were well-developed. Our classrooms were clean and had air-conditioning and non-air-conditioning facilities. The library was very good and all course-related books were available. Students used to borrow books from the library and return them after 15 days. Our canteen was good. The food served in our canteen was good.
review_content.Faculty: Our faculty members were experienced, qualified, and knowledgeable. They explained to us with the help of PPTs, PDFs, and notes. They provided notes for each unit which made our study easy.

reviews_list.batch_info: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: There are no placements and internships only for seniors.

review_content.Placements: So far, placements have not occured for pharma. D in this college. Internships or hospital visits only occur in 5th and 6th years while other colleges take students to hospital visits from 2nd year itself. The hospital may offer jobs to students after their graduation based on their performance but other than that, no placements occur through the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no hostel available in this college but laboratories and libraries are quite well-maintained with all important facilities provided. We never needed to purchase any books throughout pharma. D as the library provides them. Indoor game facilities are available for everyone but outdoor game facilities are only available for boys.

individual_reviews.title: I absolutely recommend this college, as it has the best faculty and the best quality education.

content.Placements: For internships, our college provides the best hospitals, e.g., Star Hospital, Banjara Hills. And one has to score in the 1000's rank to get into our college through EAMCET, but I must say the best college one can get into is this one. The top role offered in my course is that of a doctor.
content.Infrastructure: The labs, canteen, infrastructure, etc.—everything is top-notch; Wi-Fi isn't available in the college per se, but projectors are in every class to help the students with smart study; the labs have top-quality equipment; and the canteen has almost all the food you ever want.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is one of the best colleges in Hyderabad for pharmacy.

content.Placements: Around 100 students got placed this year in our course. The highest salary offered is Rs. 35,000 per month. The lowest salary offered is Rs. 15,000 per month. Cipla, Dr. Reddy's Laboratories, etc., visit our college. Almost 45% of students got internships and placements. The top role offered is a pharmacist in hospitals, communities, and industries.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available for students. Our labs and classrooms have good infrastructure. Every classroom has a projector. The library is very good with a good amount of books. There is no hostel in our college. The quality of the food in the canteen is good. There is an indoor game area and a ground in our college. We can play games anytime in our college. We do practicals of everything in the lab.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Our college is worth the money paid.

content.Placements: Many students got placed in our college. The salary package offered was 1 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was good. Our labs were well-developed. Our classrooms were clean and had air-conditioning and non-air-conditioning facilities. The library was very good and all course-related books were available. Students used to borrow books from the library and return them after 15 days. Our canteen was good. The food served in our canteen was good.
content.Faculty: Our faculty members were experienced, qualified, and knowledgeable. They explained to us with the help of PPTs, PDFs, and notes. They provided notes for each unit which made our study easy.

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: There are no placements and internships only for seniors.

content.Placements: So far, placements have not occured for pharma. D in this college. Internships or hospital visits only occur in 5th and 6th years while other colleges take students to hospital visits from 2nd year itself. The hospital may offer jobs to students after their graduation based on their performance but other than that, no placements occur through the college.
content.Infrastructure: There is no hostel available in this college but laboratories and libraries are quite well-maintained with all important facilities provided. We never needed to purchase any books throughout pharma. D as the library provides them. Indoor game facilities are available for everyone but outdoor game facilities are only available for boys.

individual_reviews.course: M.Pharma. in Pharmaceutical Quality Assurance - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I am fully satisfied to get admission in this college.

content.Placements: Overall, there are 15 students in our department. It is a good college with good infrastructure and faculty members. Our college got 65th rank among national level ranks.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has well-equipped and well-maintained labs. Classrooms are huge with good infrastructure, and there are 2 canteens on our campus. Variety of food items served here are pretty good. We can have lots of food items like fried rice, biryani, sandwiches, cool drinks, etc. Our college has a good environment and a good campus with lots of facilities. The library is also well-maintained.

admission_process.title: Sultan Ul Uloom College of Pharmacy Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Sultan Ul Uloom College of Pharmacy admissionis based on the exam score of the aspirants. The institute accepts scores in GPAT, TS EAMCET, and TS PGECET. Candidates are required to fill out the application form online at the official website of Sultan Ul Uloom College of Pharmacy. The college offers programmes in Medicine and Health Sciences streams.
The college offers UG courses for 4 years. For programmes at the PG level, the duration is 2 years.

The total fee ofSultan Ul Uloom College of Pharmacyincludes various components, such as caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc. Aspirants have to pay the course fee at the time of admission for seat confirmation.
